title: AI Policy
text: The organization shall document a policy for the development or use of AI systems, aligned with business objectives and applicable obligations.

title: Alignment with Other Organizational Policies
text: The organization shall determine where other policies can be affected by or apply to the organization's objectives with respect to AI systems.

title: Review of the AI Policy
text: The AI policy shall be reviewed at planned intervals, or additionally as needed, to ensure its continuing suitability, adequacy, and effectiveness.

title: AI Roles and Responsibilities
text: Roles and responsibilities for AI shall be defined and allocated according to the needs of the organization.

title: Reporting of Concerns
text: The organization shall define and put in place a process to report concerns about the organization's role with respect to an AI system throughout its life cycle.

title: Resource Documentation
text: The organization shall identify and document relevant resources required for the activities at given AI system life cycle stages and other AI-related activities.

title: Data Resources
text: As part of identifying resources, the organization shall document information about the data resources utilized for the AI system.

title: Tooling Resources
text: As part of identifying resources, the organization shall document information about the tooling resources utilized for the AI system.

title: System and Computing Resources
text: As part of identifying resources, the organization shall document the system and computing resources utilized for the AI system.

title: Human Resources
text: As part of identifying resources, the organization shall document the human resources and their competences utilized for the development, deployment, and operation of the AI system.

title: AI System Impact Assessment Process
text: The organization shall establish a process to assess the potential consequences for individuals or groups of individuals, or both, and societies that can result from the AI system throughout its life cycle.

title: Documentation of Impact Assessments
text: The organization shall document the results of AI system impact assessments and retain them for a defined period.

title: Assessing Impact on Individuals and Groups
text: The organization shall assess and document the potential impacts of AI systems to individuals or groups of individuals throughout the system's life cycle.

title: Objectives for Responsible AI Development
text: The organization shall identify and document objectives to guide the responsible development of AI systems and take those objectives into account.

title: AI System Requirements and Specification
text: The organization shall specify and document requirements for new AI systems or material enhancements to existing systems.

title: AI System Verification and Validation
text: The organization shall define and document verification and validation measures for the AI system and specify criteria for their use.

title: AI System Deployment
text: The organization shall document a deployment plan and ensure that requirements are met prior to deployment.

title: AI System Operation and Monitoring
text: The organization shall define and document the necessary elements for the ongoing operation and monitoring of the AI system.

title: Data for Development and Enhancement of AI Systems
text: The organization shall define, document, and implement data management processes related to the development of AI systems.

title: Quality of Data for AI Systems
text: The organization shall define and document requirements for data quality and ensure that data used to develop and operate the AI system meets those requirements.

title: System Documentation and Information for Users
text: The organization shall determine and provide the necessary information to users of the AI system.

title: Processes for Responsible Use of AI Systems
text: The organization shall define and document the processes for the responsible use of AI systems.

title: Allocating Responsibilities Across the AI Supply Chain
text: The organization shall ensure that responsibilities within the AI system life cycle are allocated between the organization, its suppliers, partners, and third parties.
